albums.name: Landscape Escapes
albums.description: Breathtaking landscapes, mountains, and nature's quiet moments.

albums.name: Urban Exploration
albums.description: Streets, architecture, and the vibrant life of metropolitan cities.

albums.name: Minimalist Moments
albums.description: Simple compositions focusing on geometry, light, and shadows.

photos.title: Alpenglow on Mount Rainier
photos.description:
Shot during sunrise at Reflection Lake. The first light of day hits the snowy peaks, casting a warm pink alpenglow reflected perfectly in the calm water.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506744038136-46273834b3fb)

location.name: Mount Rainier National Park, Washington, USA

photos.title: Cyberpunk Tokyo Rain
photos.description:
A rainy night in Shinjuku, Tokyo. The wet asphalt reflects the neon signs of nearby izakayas, creating a futuristic, moody atmosphere.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503899036084-c55cdd92da26)

photos.title: Concrete & Shadows
photos.description:
Architectural study of lines and contrast at the Bauhaus Archiv. A lone figure walks across the frame, highlighting the scale of the structure.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1600585154340-be6161a56a0c)

photos.title: Dunes of Namib-Naukluft
photos.description:
The stark contrast between the bright orange sands of Dune 45 and the deep morning shadows under a cloudless sky.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1682687220063-4742bd7fd538)

photos.title: Celestial Canopy
photos.description:
A single-exposure night shot of the Milky Way core arching over a calm alpine lake in the Dolomites. The tiny light from a tent completes the scale.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1475274047050-1d0c0975c63e)

location.name: Tre Cime di Lavaredo, Dolomites, Italy

photos.title: Whispers of the Forest
photos.description:
Deep in the Black Forest, dense morning mist isolates a stand of tall pine trees. A serene, green, and quiet minimalist frame.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1448375240586-882707db888b)

photos.title: Majestic Peaks of Yosemite
photos.description:
Golden hour sunlight illuminating the granite walls of El Capitan and Half Dome during late autumn.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464822759023-fed622ff2c3b)

photos.title: Golden Sunset over Shibuya
photos.description:
Warm sunset light streaming down the bustling avenues of Shibuya, casting long shadows across pedestrians.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1492571350019-22de08371fd3)

photos.title: Symmetry & Modern Geometry
photos.description:
Clean minimalist composition exploring repeating geometric lines and monochrome shadows of modern architectural design.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513694203232-719a280e022f)

photos.title: Ascending Light & Shadows
photos.description:
High contrast study of light falling upon a spiral staircase, creating rhythmic geometric curves.

(Photo source: Unsplash - https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1509114397022-ed747cca3f65)
